response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (38%) is above our minimum threshold (50%), and our household autonomy is critically low (~20 min); holding energy reserves is essential to prevent cascading microgrid failure during islanded operation.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r3c5. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.38 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=['r2c3'].
Your latest belief: Islanded, SoC 11% and declining at 1 kW with ~20 min autonomy. All neighbors in deficit; prior sharing ineffective. Microgrid-wide deadlock detected. Prioritize load-shedding and grid reconnection. Hold all outbound energy to preserve household resilience..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
